title: US dollar to rupiah rate disappears from Google after plummeting to IDR 8,170
body: Google is no longer displaying information on the US dollar (US) to rupiah exchange rate on its main page, following a data anomaly that caused the US dollar to fall to the level of IDR 8,170.

title: Healthcare sector transforms, check out MIKA and HEAL's stock prospects
body: Hospital stocks are increasingly attractive amid healthcare reforms, which is more interesting: MIKA or HEAL?

title: US dollar and euro on Google plummet by over 50%, Bank Indonesia responds
body: Bank Indonesia has confirmed that the fall in the dollar and euro exchange rates by Google is not the level it should be.

title: Singapore, China, and the US increase their investment in Indonesia
body: Singapore is consistently the largest contributor of FDI in Indonesia in 2024, followed by Hong Kong and China.

title: Indonesia's investment realisation in 2024 exceeds target, reaching IDR 1,714.2 trillion
body: The increase in investment realisation throughout 2024 reached 20.8% yoy, supported by double-digit growth in foreign and domestic investment.

title: US dollar to rupiah rate disappears from Google after plummeting to IDR 8,170

body: The increase in investment realisation throughout 2024 reached 20.8% yoy, supported by double-digit growth in foreign and domestic investment.
